key_metrics: Gross profit of $4.53 billion, down 3.1% YoY
Inventories flat at $7.49 billion vs May 31, 2025
qoq_changes: Cash and equivalents decreased to $6.66 billion from $7.46 billion at fiscal year-end
Long-term debt decreased to $7.03 billion, with $999 million shifting to current portion
new_risks: Gross margin compression of approximately 140 basis points YoY
Significant increase in effective tax rate (20.0% vs 5.9% YoY) pressuring net income
Qualitative risk factors (Item 1A) were not provided in the excerpt
management_tone: Cautious; while top-line revenue remained stable, significant margin compression and higher tax expenses led to a sharp decline in net income.
analyst_note: Nike's Q3 2026 results indicate profitability headwinds, with flat revenue growth failing to offset declining gross margins and a higher tax burden, resulting in a 34.5% drop in net income.
